rag_documents.title: Customer Refund & Returns Policy 2026
rag_documents.content: All items purchased within 30 days are eligible for a full refund if they are in original packaging. Shipping delays exceeding 5 standard business days qualify for a $10 discount coupon. For delayed deliveries, support agents should verify the order tracking status using the query_order_database tool first. If the package is lost, initiate a reshipment immediately and log a report.
chunks: All items purchased within 30 days are eligible for a full refund if they are in original packaging.
Shipping delays exceeding 5 standard business days qualify for a $10 discount coupon.
For delayed deliveries, support agents should verify the order tracking status using the query_order_database tool first.
If the package is lost, initiate a reshipment immediately and log a report.

rag_documents.title: Agent Orchestration Guidelines
rag_documents.content: Standard multi-agent orchestration follows a three-layer pipeline: Router/Planner, Specialist Retriever, and Tool Executor. The Router receives the query, classifies intent, and delegates to either RAG (for general queries) or Tool Executor (for transactional lookups). The final answer is synthesized by the Orchestrator with references to source document IDs.
chunks: Standard multi-agent orchestration follows a three-layer pipeline: Router/Planner, Specialist Retriever, and Tool Executor.
The Router receives the query, classifies intent, and delegates to either RAG (for general queries) or Tool Executor (for transactional lookups).
The final answer is synthesized by the Orchestrator with references to source document IDs.

rag_documents.title: SLA (Service Level Agreement) and Technical Support Tiering
rag_documents.content: Technical support is organized into three distinct tiers. Tier 1 handles general password resets, UI navigation questions, and standard inquiries with an SLA response time of 2 hours. Tier 2 handles system integrations, minor bug verification, and configuration issues with a response time of 8 hours. Tier 3 is reserved for critical database outages, code-level bug fixes, and security patches, offering a 1-hour response window. All SLA breaches must be logged in the system_outage_logs table and reported to the engineering supervisor.
chunks: Technical support is organized into three distinct tiers.
Tier 1 handles general password resets, UI navigation questions, and standard inquiries with an SLA response time of 2 hours.
Tier 2 handles system integrations, minor bug verification, and configuration issues with a response time of 8 hours.
Tier 3 is reserved for critical database outages, code-level bug fixes, and security patches, offering a 1-hour response window.
All SLA breaches must be logged in the system_outage_logs table and reported to the engineering supervisor.

rag_documents.title: Corporate Travel & Expense Reimbursement Policy
rag_documents.content: Employees traveling on official business are entitled to reimbursements within strict fiscal constraints. Lodging is capped at $250 per night for domestic flights and $400 for international destinations. Individual meals are reimbursable up to $75 daily without receipts, or $150 with itemized receipts. Mileage reimbursement is set at $0.67 per mile. Expense reports must be submitted within 14 calendar days of return, or they will be automatically rejected by the automated finance ledger agent.
chunks: Employees traveling on official business are entitled to reimbursements within strict fiscal constraints.
Lodging is capped at $250 per night for domestic flights and $400 for international destinations.
Individual meals are reimbursable up to $75 daily without receipts, or $150 with itemized receipts.
Mileage reimbursement is set at $0.67 per mile.
Expense reports must be submitted within 14 calendar days of return, or they will be automatically rejected by the automated finance ledger agent.

rag_documents.title: Data Security & Privacy Compliance Guidelines
rag_documents.content: To comply with international data security regulations (including GDPR and CCPA), all customer personally identifiable information (PII) must be encrypted both in transit and at rest. PII includes full names, home addresses, billing details, and IP logs. No sub-agent or LLM tool is permitted to log raw customer credit card details or unmasked SSNs under any circumstances. Any detected security vulnerability must be routed immediately to the Compliance Officer, and system access logs must be audited using the access_auditor tool.
chunks: To comply with international data security regulations (including GDPR and CCPA), all customer personally identifiable information (PII) must be encrypted both in transit and at rest.
PII includes full names, home addresses, billing details, and IP logs.
No sub-agent or LLM tool is permitted to log raw customer credit card details or unmasked SSNs under any circumstances.
Any detected security vulnerability must be routed immediately to the Compliance Officer, and system access logs must be audited using the access_auditor tool.

rag_documents.title: Supplier & Vendor Management Framework
rag_documents.content: Our supplier engagement matrix regulates vendor evaluation, procurement cycles, and contractual agreements. Vendor performance is rated quarterly on a 1-100 index based on delivery accuracy and price consistency. Active contracts must undergo legal compliance reviews every 12 months. Any price hike exceeding 4.5% annually requires the written approval of the Procurement VP and a competitive margin analysis conducted by the Sourcing Specialist using the competitor_price_scraper tool.
chunks: Our supplier engagement matrix regulates vendor evaluation, procurement cycles, and contractual agreements.
Vendor performance is rated quarterly on a 1-100 index based on delivery accuracy and price consistency.
Active contracts must undergo legal compliance reviews every 12 months.

Any price hike exceeding 4.5% annually requires the written approval of the Procurement VP and a competitive margin analysis conducted by the Sourcing Specialist using the competitor_price_scraper tool.

rag_documents.title: Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity Protocol
rag_documents.content: In the event of database corruption or primary cloud datacenter failure, our active-passive backup architecture triggers failover routines. Primary databases sync every 5 minutes to Cloud Storage buckets. The Maximum Allowable Data Loss (RPO) is set at 15 minutes, while the Target Recovery Time (RTO) is 2 hours. Support agents should refer to critical incident tickets and redirect users to temporary mirrors if primary regions are offline.

The Maximum Allowable Data Loss (RPO) is set at 15 minutes, while the Target Recovery Time (RTO) is 2 hours.
Support agents should refer to critical incident tickets and redirect users to temporary mirrors if primary regions are offline.

rag_documents.title: Employee Remote Work & Equipment Allocation Policy
rag_documents.content: All remote employees are eligible for an initial tech hardware stipend of $1,500. Standard equipment packages include an approved company laptop, a 27-inch external monitor, and a security-compliant VPN router. Equipment remains company property and must be returned within 10 days of contract termination. Any replacement requests due to hardware degradation require a supervisor verification code and a formal support ticket logged in the inventory management system.

rag_documents.title: Q2 Inventory & Supply Chain Sourcing SLA
rag_documents.content: Inventory stocking thresholds are monitored daily by automated logistics modules. If stock level for high-demand retail items drops below 150 units, an auto-replenishment order is compiled. Warehouse fulfillment times are bound to a strict 24-hour turnaround SLA. Any sourcing delay from suppliers must be reported to the sourcing_specialist agent, who computes Q2 grocery margins and updates active retail pricing hedges in the database.

rag_query_logs.query: What is the refund policy for delayed packages?

retrievedChunks.content: Shipping delays exceeding 5 standard business days qualify for a $10 discount coupon.
All items purchased within 30 days are eligible for a full refund if they are in original packaging.

rag_query_logs.generatedResponse: According to the Customer Refund & Returns Policy 2026, purchases are eligible for a full refund within 30 days if in original packaging. Additionally, shipping delays exceeding 5 standard business days qualify for a $10 discount coupon.
